title: Crispy Asparagus Stir Fry
description: Quick and delicious stir fry recipe using asparagus, crispy texture, and citrus flavors.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the asparagus and cook for 3-4 minutes or until slightly tender.
Add the grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Pour in the lime juice and stir to combine.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil and crushed red pepper.
Toss to coat and season with salt to taste.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional lime wedges if desired.
